sourceRef.citation: Annual Methodological Archive Research Review et al. 2026

statement.en: Phytochemical Screening of Selected Cholistani Plants and Their Biological Activities by In-Vitro Assays

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint/methodological review dated 2026 (future date, suggesting provisional status). Phytochemical screening results are empirically testable but dependent on methodology validation. The biological activity claims require peer review and replication before classification as TRUE. The work sits in active research territory, not yet solidified into established fact.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 砂漠の植物に秘められた治癒の力が、時間とともに花開く
